creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
freebsd-update(8) and boot environments
=======================================

Cross-reference: <https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/84822/>

Creation of boot environments is a significant enhancement, I reckon that release notes should mention this. Under <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/blob/main/website/content/en/releases/13.1R/relnotes.adoc#userland>, maybe?

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?h=releng/13.1&id=1420778e9ee6486331dec3a1bf143c697cb72706>
